query:
SELECT o.slug, o.name, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM taskCompletion tc WHERE tc.orgId = o.id) as tasks,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validationResults vr WHERE vr.orgId = o.id) as validations,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orgNotes n WHERE n.orgId = o.id) as files,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeResponses ir WHERE ir.orgId = o.id) as intakeAnswers
FROM organizations o ORDER BY o.slug;
